name: World Famous Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert slivers of garlic and rosemary into the pot roast.
2. Brown the pot roast on all sides.
3. Add the chopped onion to the pan and brown it.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: red wine, crushed tomatoes, tomato puree, tomato paste, tomato sauce, Italian herbs, bay leaves, oregano, salt, pepper, and bouillon.
5. Simmer for 3 hours and 30 minutes uncovered.
6. Taste for seasoning and add more if needed.
7. Thin with canned bouillon if desired.
